summary: Frontend-only testing of TaxNext.in premium CA firm website. Tested all major features: home page sections, header navigation, services mega menu, routing, contact form, compliance calendar, coming soon pages, mobile view, and footer.

ui_bugs.issue: On mobile (390px), 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps/hides the WhatsApp button. Only 'Call Us' button is fully visible.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge covers the WhatsApp button in the bottom CTA bar on mobile screens

action_items: Minor: Consider adding bottom padding/margin on MobileBottomCTA to prevent 'Made with Emergent' badge from overlapping WhatsApp button
critical_code_review_comments: Contact form inputs don't have name attributes set (input name=None) - not blocking but good practice for forms
Hero section has 2 elements with 'Book Free Consultation' text - one is mobile hidden CTA, one is hero CTA. This is fine but selectors need care
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working: home (hero, trust bar, services grid, testimonials, insights, CTA sections), sticky header with mega menu, routing to /about /services /calculators /insights /compliance-calendar /resources /contact, AI Tax Assistant and Client Portal show coming soon, contact form submits with success state (MOCKED - frontend only), footer 4 columns. Mobile hamburger found. Only minor issue is WhatsApp button overlap with Made with Emergent badge on mobile.
mocked_apis: Contact form POST - returns immediate success without backend API call
